title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited:
Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited!
